title: Sweet Crispy Thai Semolina Cake
description: A modern twist on traditional Thai desserts, this sweet crispy semolina cake combines crunchy and soft textures. The perfect treat for any occasion.
instructions: Grease a 9x13-inch baking dish and set aside.
In a medium bowl, whisk together the semolina and flour.
In a large bowl, combine the sugar, coconut oil, eggs, and vanilla extract. Beat until well combined.
Add the semolina mixture to the wet ingredients and mix until a smooth batter forms.
Pour the batter into the prepared baking dish and smooth the top.
Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center of the cake comes out clean.
Remove the cake from the oven and sprinkle the crushed sweet crispy cereal on top.
Return the cake to the oven and bake for an additional 5-7 minutes, or until the cereal is lightly toasted.
Remove the cake from the oven and let it cool completely in the pan before slicing and serving.
